title: oenothera boothii var. pygmaea
intro: Oenothera boothii var. pygmaea, also known as Pygmy Evening Primrose, is a rare and small flowering plant species that belongs to the Evening Primrose family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oenothera boothii var. pygmaea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. This plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
